**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Suzhou Tianhong Laser Co., Ltd. presents a highly authentic and robust profile of a specialized industrial laser equipment manufacturer. Unlike many firms with inflated scopes, Tianhong Laser's operational metrics perfectly align with its stated business. Located in the Suzhou Industrial Park, a major high-tech manufacturing hub, the company employs a significant workforce of 244 insured personnel (2024 data). This headcount, coupled with a solid registered capital of 72.32 million RMB, fully supports the complex R&D, assembly, and testing required for producing industrial-grade laser application equipment and optomechanical integration products. Furthermore, its digital footprint (@tianhonglaser.com) and clear, focused business scope confirm it is a genuine, mid-to-large scale OEM/manufacturer serving the advanced manufacturing sector, explicitly stripped of any irrelevant consumer electronics (Apple/iPhone) hallucinations.
